label: GOOD
review_text: Absolute beast of a card. Runs Cyberpunk at max settings with ray tracing on and stays under 65C. Fans are quiet even under full load. Highly recommend if your power supply can handle it.

label: GOOD
review_text: Easy install, works great out of the box. DLSS 3 frame generation is basically free performance. Temps run cool and I have not heard any coil whine so far.

label: GOOD
review_text: Great value card for 1080p gaming. Runs every game I own at high settings. Only minor complaint is the software feels bloated, but the hardware itself is solid.

label: BAD
review_text: Card arrived dead on arrival. No display output at all, tested on two different systems and power supplies. Now dealing with the return process which has been slow and frustrating.

label: BAD
review_text: Terrible coil whine under load. It is louder than my entire fan setup and completely audible through headphones. For a card this expensive that is unacceptable. Considering a refund.

label: GOOD
review_text: Upgraded from a 1080 Ti and the difference is night and day. Frame rates doubled at 1440p. Card is quiet, runs cool, and fits my mid tower case with room to spare.

label: BAD
review_text: Performance is fine but the card started crashing after a driver update. Rolling back fixed it but I should not have to babysit drivers on a new card.

label: GOOD
review_text: Silent operation, incredible ray tracing performance, and the build quality feels premium. VRAM headroom makes it future proof for 4K gaming.

label: BAD
review_text: Second unit with the same problem: severe coil whine and thermal throttling under sustained load. Customer service was unhelpful and the RMA process took three weeks. Returning for a refund.

label: GOOD
review_text: Solid 1440p card. Form factor is compact enough for small builds. Make sure your case has clearance though, some versions of this card are surprisingly large.

label: BAD
review_text: Card works but the advertised boost clock is misleading. It also requires an adapter cable that was not included. Feels overpriced for what you actually get.

label: GOOD
review_text: Flawless so far. Runs every game at ultra settings at 4K with DLSS. Memory temps stay reasonable and the fan curve is well tuned out of the box.

label: GOOD
review_text: The performance is unreal. Blender renders that took minutes now take seconds. Gaming at 4K max settings is effortless. Worth every penny for work and play.

label: BAD
review_text: Faulty unit. Random black screens and artifacts within the first week. Amazon return was easy but I expected better quality control at this price point.

label: GOOD
review_text: Perfect budget card for my first build. Installation was simple, drivers installed without issues, and it runs cool and quiet. Great entry point for PC gaming.
